parameters-en.Mode: Selects one of four acoustic guitar sounds: Standard is a traditional acoustic guitar, Jumbo is larger and fuller, Enhanced has a more prominent attack for cutting through a mix, and Piezo approximates the sound of a piezo pickup installed on the guitar.
parameters-en.Body: Adds body resonance, which can provide additional fullness or fatness.
parameters-en.Top: Accentuates higher end string attack and harmonics.
parameters-en.Shimmer: Imparts some motion to the harmonics, reminiscent of how a string's vibration tends to affect the other strings.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
